untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'candle pattern' detection and specific pattern extremes (top/bottom) that require pattern recognition logic not available in indicator-based rules. The exact 3-7 day timing and pattern identification cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. Additionally, the source text is incomplete ('price closes ne...').
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as a proxy for candle pattern extremes and ADX for trend confirmation. However, this is a simplification as the original signal requires explicit candle pattern detection (identification of specific candlestick formations) which is not supported by the allowed indicators. The hold_days_max of 10 reflects the median 10-day trend duration mentioned in exit conditions. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original specification.
